Service 03

Fractional CTO
Advisory

Senior technical leadership for companies that need an experienced CTO — without the full-time salary. Architecture, team, strategy, and execution.

What you get

Everything a CTO does.
None of the overhead.

Ideal for startups, scale-ups, and businesses going through a technology inflection point.

01

Technology Strategy

Build-vs-buy decisions, tech stack selection, architecture design, and a roadmap aligned with your business objectives and budget.

ArchitectureStack selectionBuild vs buyRoadmap
02

Team Building & Leadership

Hiring criteria, interview processes, team structure, and day-to-day technical leadership. We help you build a team that can scale.

HiringTeam structureMentorshipProcesses
03

Vendor & Agency Management

Evaluate external partners, manage technical vendors, and ensure code quality across third-party work.

Vendor evaluationCode reviewsQuality gatesSLAs
04

Fundraising Technical Support

Technical due diligence prep, investor Q&A support, architecture documentation, and security reviews for funding rounds.

Due diligenceInvestor decksSecurity auditDocumentation
Engagement models

Flexible. Transparent.
No lock-in.

01

Strategy Sprint (4 weeks)

Deep dive into your tech stack, team, and roadmap. Deliverable: written architecture review and 12-month technology roadmap.

FIXED PRICE
02

Part-time CTO (ongoing)

1–2 days per week embedded with your team. Attend standups, review PRs, mentor engineers, run tech leadership.

MONTHLY RETAINER
03

On-demand advisory

Access to Francesco for async reviews, key hiring decisions, architecture questions, and investor Q&A.

HOURLY
